heading: Establishment
label: 351 Establishment
text: There is hereby established a commission to be known as the Citizens’ Commission on Public Service and Compensation (hereinafter referred to as the “Commission”).
notes: Amendments1989— substituted “Citizens’ Commission on Public Service and Compensation” for “Commission on Executive, Legislative, and Judicial Salaries”.Pub. L. 101–194
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under , Government Organization and Employees.Dec. 16, 1967section 220(a)(1) of Pub. L. 90–206section 3110 of Title 5
amendments: Amendments1989— substituted “Citizens’ Commission on Public Service and Compensation” for “Commission on Executive, Legislative, and Judicial Salaries”.Pub. L. 101–194
